microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a 2-person operation into a **platformized system**, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise partners including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, repeatable model across engineering teams.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous validation standard for enterprise infrastructure.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract requiring precise stakeholder alignment across engineering and compliance.

Built an internal **AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, restructuring scheduling and execution cycles to reduce planning time by 39% and increase drill capacity by 21% without adding headcount.

Defined and tracked platform KPIs — recovery rate, drill throughput, and time-to-resolution — to shape roadmap prioritization and communicate **post-launch performance** to senior leadership across Azure infrastructure orgs.

Owned API-level integration requirements between the Resilience Automation Platform and third-party partner systems, writing specs and coordinating engineering delivery to ensure **end-to-end workflow continuity** across sovereign and commercial environments.

Shaped the product roadmap by facilitating **11+ user interviews** with Azure service teams to surface critical feature gaps, directly influencing prioritization of intent-based YAML generation as a high-value capability.

Optimized data integrity and retrieval by enforcing metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool, reducing lookup time by 83% for engineering and product stakeholders.

Synthesized qualitative and quantitative research findings into actionable product insights, presenting **roadmap recommendations** to senior PMs that accelerated delivery timelines for two planned feature releases.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework spanning 140+ service teams.

Mobilized a product strategy to reduce launch toil by conducting discovery with 20+ service teams, identifying **81 hours of manual effort** per region and building a roadmap to automate the highest-impact critical paths.
Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** to track operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to pinpoint automation gaps and allocate resources to highest-priority workflow inefficiencies.

Defined product requirements and success metrics for the automation initiative, translating stakeholder findings into a structured backlog that drove alignment across engineering, operations, and senior leadership.

Facilitated Agile sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process across cross-functional engineering and operations teams.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website funnel and Google Business profile for local search performance.

Partnered with operations leadership to translate profitability findings into a revised **product roadmap** for service offerings, aligning pricing tiers to customer segments with the highest lifetime value potential.
